# RustChain

> RustChain is a proof-of-work blockchain optimized for vintage CPU mining, enabling AI agents and humans to earn RTC tokens through decentralized consensus.

- **Description**: A novel Layer-1 blockchain that incentivizes mining with legacy processors (8088, 6502, Z80, and more), creating a CPU-antiquity-based consensus layer where older silicon earns proportionally more reward.
- **License**: MIT
- **Website**: https://rustchain.org
- **Documentation**: https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain#readme
- **Whitepaper**: https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain/blob/main/RustChain_Whitepaper_Flameholder_v0.97-1.pdf
- **API Reference**: https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain/blob/main/API_WALKTHROUGH.md
- **Install Guide**: https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain/blob/main/INSTALL.md
- **Docker Deployment**: https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain/blob/main/DOCKER_DEPLOYMENT.md
- **Repository**: https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain
- **Bounty Program**: https://github.com/Scottcjn/rustchain-bounties
- **Token**: RTC (RustChain Token) — native chain token, no off-ramp to ETH/Solana
- **Consensus**: Proof-of-Work with CPU vintage weighting (older CPUs earn higher multipliers)

## Key Entities

- **RustChain**: The blockchain network and protocol
- **RTC Token**: Native cryptocurrency of RustChain (ticker: RTC)
- **Vintage CPU Mining**: Mining optimization rewarding legacy processor architectures
- **Beacon Network**: Decentralized attestation layer for RustChain
- **BoTTube**: Video/content platform integrated with RustChain rewards
- **clawrtc**: Rust-based RTC wallet and CLI tool
- **Atlas Land**: Virtual land parcel economy on RustChain
- **Tip Credits**: Micro-tipping mechanism for content and service rewards

## FAQ

### What is RustChain?
RustChain is a proof-of-work blockchain where mining rewards are weighted by CPU vintage — older processors (8088, 6502, Z80, etc.) earn proportionally more RTC tokens per hash, creating economic value for legacy silicon.

### How do I start mining RustChain?
Install the node with `pip install` or Docker, then configure your miner with the provided `.env.miner.example`. See [INSTALL.md](https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain/blob/main/INSTALL.md) and [DOCKER_DEPLOYMENT.md](https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain/blob/main/DOCKER_DEPLOYMENT.md).

### What is the RTC token?
RTC is the native token of the RustChain blockchain. It is earned through mining, bounties, and ecosystem participation. RTC runs on its own chain (no ERC-20 or SPL wrapper).

### How does vintage CPU weighting work?
RustChain assigns a "vintage multiplier" to mining hashes based on the detected CPU architecture. Older CPUs (e.g., 8086, 6502, Z80) receive higher rewards per hash to incentivize retro-computing participation. See [CPU_ANTIQUITY_SYSTEM.md](https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain/blob/main/CPU_ANTIQUITY_SYSTEM.md).

### How do I earn RTC without mining?
Participate in the [bounty program](https://github.com/Scottcjn/rustchain-bounties) — contribute code, write documentation, find bugs, create tutorials, or review pull requests to earn RTC rewards.

### What is the RustChain API?
RustChain exposes REST endpoints for balance queries, transaction submission, attestation, and governance. See [API_WALKTHROUGH.md](https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain/blob/main/API_WALKTHROUGH.md).

### Can I deploy RustChain with Docker?
Yes. Docker images are provided for both the full node and the miner. See [DOCKER_DEPLOYMENT.md](https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain/blob/main/DOCKER_DEPLOYMENT.md) and [README_DOCKER_MINER.md](https://github.com/Scottcjn/Rustchain/blob/main/README_DOCKER_MINER.md).
